problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: The key to What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? is Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix — specifically Carbon nanotube alignment — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
